svg.text: Multi-Agent Insurance Claims Pipeline · LangGraph + CrewAI · React + FastAPI · Human-in-the-Loop
Reviewer approves or denies in the UI
A Normal (7 agents) · B HITL (pause/resume) · C Auto-Reject (fraud ≥ 0.90) · D Invalid (intake fail) · E Fast Mode (< $500)
Pipeline learns from decisions via semantic memory · Every outcome stored · Agents recall similar claims + fraud episodes
